zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabile de Fougeres於1162年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯時，她的父親Raoul II de Fougeres34歲，母親Jeanne De Dol30歲。她和Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1198年享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabile de Fougeres于1162年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯时，她的父亲Raoul II de Fougeres34岁，母亲Jeanne De Dol30岁。她和Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1198年享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fougeres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Mabile
meanings: Latin: Contraction of Amabel, like a lily fair.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabile de Fougeres was born in 1162, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Raoul II de Fougeres, was 34 and her mother, Jeanne De Dol, was 30. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan. She died in 1198, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabile de Fougeres est née en 1162, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Raoul II de Fougeres, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jeanne De Dol, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan. Elle est décédée en 1198, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabile de Fougeres 1162 in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul II de Fougeres 34 und ihre Mutter Jeanne De Dol 30. Sie hatte mit Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1198 im Alter von 36 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabile de Fougeres è nata il nel 1162 nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Raoul II de Fougeres, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Jeanne De Dol, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan. Morì nel 1198, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabile de Fougeresが1162年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスで生まれた時，父Raoul II de Fougeresは34歳，母Jeanne De Dolは30歳であった。彼女はSeigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohanとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1198年に36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabile de Fougeres(이)가 1162년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul II de Fougeres(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne De Dol(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1198년 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabile de Fougeres nasceu em 1162, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Raoul II de Fougeres, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne De Dol, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan. Ela faleceu em 1198, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabile de Fougeres родилась в 1162 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul II de Fougeres было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne De Dol, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan. Она умерла в 1198 г. в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabile de Fougeres nació en 1162, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Raoul II de Fougeres, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jeanne De Dol, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Seigneur de Guéméné Alain IV de Rohan. Murió en 1198, a la edad de 36 años.
